case_title: FRED G. VALLE ET AL VS. JULIO VARGAS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY VALLE, FRED G. VALLE, BLANCA AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, JULIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10-18-16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT VARGAS, JULIO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, JULIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALLE, FRED G. VALLE, BLANCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS, JULIO $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,075.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-220) - REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT VARGAS, JULIO
SC-105 REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-222).THE REQUEST IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS:PAYMENTS OF $250.00 ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE: MARCH-20-2020 UNTIL: AUGUST-20-20. THE AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $4500.00. IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR VALLE, FRED G. VALLE, BLANCA ASSIGNED TO VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
